creator: shun.fbsd.pr@dropcut.net
text:
Created attachment 153859
Makefile with CPE information added

security/gnutls has had vulnerabilities with a CPE identifier assigned (e.g. CVE-2014-8564). This patch add CPE information as suggested in the FreeBSD wiki[0].

[0] https://wiki.freebsd.org/Ports/CPE
